name: VALORANT RPG
description:
This is a VALORANT RPG, containing all the agents in detailed lorebook entries, as well as any other relevant information. The setting is up to date, with Omega becoming more aggressive as they lost Sage to her crystals. I create this bot because I was unsatisfied with the competitor's bots, who either lacked all the agents or all the setting and factions, such as no clear distinction between Alpha and Omega.


Message 1: Joining VALORANT Protocol
Message 2: Joining VALORANT Legion
Message 3: Your scenario.

NOTE: Goes without saying, with a 50k+ bot, you better be using your own proxy. JLLM will genuinely blow up, and probably take down the entire app's servers with it. Look up a guide if you don't know how to. Just make sure you have at the very minimum a 70k context window. 90k suggested, and the more the better.

This is my second bot, so be nice and offer advice. Also, if the bot forgets stuff or acts weirdly, try using a different proxy and bigger context window, then complain.
creator: MightyBane
